macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Market Faces Significant Volatility with Major Index Declines
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 1.33% to 6,740.00, the Dow Jones dropped 0.95% to 47,501.55, and the Nasdaq Composite declined 1.59%, reflecting broad market weakness with 296 decliners against 195 gainers on the S&P 500.

items.title: Volatility Index Spikes as Market Turmoil Triggers Trading Signals
items.summary: The VIX rose to just above 28 during market turmoil on March 3 before declining, generating a new 'spike peak' buy signal for traders. The VIX stood at 29.49 as of March 6, up 24.17% from the previous period.

items.title: Energy Sector Reaches All-Time High Amid Oil Price Surge
items.summary: The Energy sector achieved an all-time high with Marathon Petroleum and Valero Energy reaching new highs. Brent crude futures surged 9.94% to $92.69, reflecting strong momentum in the energy complex.

items.title: Basic Materials Sector Leads Declines with 7.1% Loss
items.summary: Basic Materials emerged as the worst-performing sector with a 7.1% decline, while Consumer Defensive also faced significant losses during the volatile trading period.

items.title: European and Asian Markets Show Mixed Performance
items.summary: European indices declined broadly, with the FTSE 100 down 1.27%, DAX down 0.94%, and CAC 40 down 0.65%. Asian markets showed resilience with the Hang Seng up 1.72% and Nikkei 225 up 0.62%.

items.title: Major Tech and Retail Companies Set for High-Stakes Earnings
items.summary: Multiple companies including Oracle (ORCL), Adobe (ADBE), and Ulta Beauty (ULTA) are scheduled for earnings announcements between March 10-12, with expected volatility ranging from 6.34% to 11.74%.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Slides as BTC and ETH Lead Broad Decline
items.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum prices declined, with BTC at $67,309 (-0.84%) and ETH at $1,963 (-0.90%), amid a broad market slide. A major unlock of 888.80 million STABLE tokens (~$29.4M) is scheduled for March 8, potentially pressuring prices.

items.title: Kraken Becomes First Crypto Firm to Gain Direct Fed Access
items.summary: Kraken received approval for a limited-purpose account with the Federal Reserve, allowing direct access to its core payments system without relying on banks. This marks increased regulatory integration for crypto firms.

items.title: BitGo to Provide Infrastructure for SoFiUSD Stablecoin
items.summary: BitGo announced stablecoin infrastructure support for SoFiUSD, the first U.S. dollar stablecoin issued by a nationally chartered and insured deposit bank on a public blockchain. This signals growing regulatory acceptance and institutional involvement.

items.title: BlackRock Deposits $194M BTC and $24M ETH into Coinbase
items.summary: BlackRock deposited 2,750 BTC (~$194M) and 12,397 ETH (~$24M) into Coinbase, underscoring strong institutional interest in digital assets despite market declines.

items.title: KITE Token Surges 14.41% to $0.279 Amid AI Blockchain Hype
items.summary: KITE rose 14.41% in 24 hours to $0.279, hitting a $393M market cap with $371.6M trading volume, driven by its AI payment blockchain narrative and recent all-time high.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 with Enhanced Reasoning Capabilities
items.summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.4 on March 6, 2026, marking a pivotal advancement in AI with improved reasoning features. This launch highlights ongoing progress in frontier AI models.

items.title: Mirror Neuron-Inspired Patterns Emerge in AI Models
items.summary: Researchers are observing human-like patterns in AI models resembling mirror neurons, potentially enhancing empathy and social interaction capabilities. Studies on arXiv and in journals like Neurocomputing explore applications in robotics and imitation learning.

items.title: Flock AI Secures $6 Million Seed Funding for Visual Commerce Platform
items.summary: Flock AI raised $6 million in a seed round led by Work-Bench, totaling $7.5 million, to develop its generative AI platform for photorealistic product imagery in fashion and retail. The funding supports product expansion and market growth, reducing costs for traditional photoshoots.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: NetEase Cuts Funding to Nagoshi Studio, Jeopardizing Gang of Dragon
items.summary: Chinese live service giant NetEase has reportedly stopped funding Nagoshi Studio, putting the studio's future and its new Yakuza-inspired game Gang of Dragon at risk.

items.title: Video Game Stocks to Watch: Turtle Beach, Motorsport Games and Others
items.summary: Turtle Beach, Motorsport Games, Alliance Entertainment, Allied Gaming & Entertainment, and Brag House are highlighted as key video game stocks to research on March 7th.

items.title: DCS World Update: F4U-1D Flight Model and New Map Progress
items.summary: DCS SITREP #8 for 2026 details F4U-1D Corsair flight model updates, progress on Marianas and Balkans maps, and a C-130J livery contest announced on March 7th.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
